title: centaurea kuhdashtensis
intro: Centaurea kuhdashtensis, also known as Kuhdasht Cornflower or Mountain Cornflower, is a rare species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to Iran. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea kuhdashtensis include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Centaurea kuhdashtensis are available in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
